idx-hero-title:
For the People.
For the Republic.
idx-hero-sub: A campaign for the working masses. I am fighting for a Republic where every small business can thrive and every rural town is connected - built on the unbreakable foundations of our republic.
marquee-text: For the People • For the Republic
idx-vision-desc: Our campaign is built on tangible commitments to the people of the Republic. From restoring fair taxation and reforming our intelligence services, to expanding the judiciary, funding R&D centers in every state, and connecting every community through CapriConnect high-speed rail, we are fighting for a Republic that works for everyone.
ld-bio-florence: Born on 5 April 2017 in Kazana, Florence Marin is a Former Senator whose legislative expertise anchors our movement. As Chairwoman, she brings years of strategic leadership to the party, working to unify our coalition and championing the broader vision of a Republic that truly serves the people.
ld-bio-william: Born on 15 April 2028 in Cambria, William Smith is a dedicated Member of Parliament. Known for his steadfast advocacy, he works tirelessly on the national stage to push for critical intelligence reform and ensure our judicial system is expanded to protect the rights of every citizen.
ld-bio-sherwin: Born on 17 May 2024 in Mezata, Sherwin Hildebrand is the current Governor of Mezata. With a strong executive track record, his leadership focuses on practical, regional development, including the ambitious rollout of new R&D centers and the CapriConnect high-speed rail network.
ld-bio-aldric: Born on 15 February 2035 in Ventura, Aldric von Reichel is an energetic Member of Parliament. As our Chief of Staff, he is the driving force behind the party's campaign strategies and is deeply committed to implementing our proposed wealth tax to ensure a fairer economy.
footer-motto: For the Republic. For the People.
footer-copy:
Upcoming Elections · Caprica
Social Democratic Alliance
plat-desc: Our comprehensive blueprint for a stronger Republic. We are committed to economic justice, uncompromising national security, robust democratic institutions, and seamlessly connecting every community through modern infrastructure and localized innovation.
auto-platform-9: We will bring back taxation for luxury goods and implement a robust wealth tax to ensure the ultra-rich pay their fair share. Simultaneously, we support our foundational smaller businesses by lowering their taxes for each employee they employ, directly incentivizing local job creation and community growth.
auto-platform-11: The defense of the Republic requires a unified approach. We will repeal the Nuremberg Act, which unjustly punishes the Caprican Office of Intelligence (COIN). To create a streamlined and impenetrable intelligence apparatus, we will merge domestic security (CIVIC) back into COIN.
auto-platform-13: Our courts must reflect the true scope and needs of our growing Republic. We pledge to nominate Mary Reichel Proctor to the Supreme Court and actively expand the court's seats to ensure a balanced, robust, and profoundly fair judicial system that works for all Capricans.
auto-platform-15: Education and innovation are the twin engines of the Republic. We are committing to massively increased funding for higher education. Furthermore, we will establish a dedicated Research & Development (R&D) Center in every state. These centers will be staffed first by the local community and will prioritize solving the unique industrial and ecological needs of their respective regions.
auto-platform-17: Our economy relies on seamless connectivity. Under our new CapriConnect infrastructure plan, we will aggressively expand the infrastructure of rural nodes for commercial and logistical use. The core aim of CapriConnect is to link every single state across the Republic with a modernized high-speed rail network, ensuring no region is left behind.
auto-events-138: Follow the Social Democratic Alliance on the campaign trail as we bring the platform to every corner of the Republic.
auto-events-11: Location: The Capitol Grand Plaza, Caprica City
auto-events-13: Join party leadership and our endorsed candidates as we officially launch the campaign trail for the upcoming elections.
auto-events-21: An open discussion focusing on union rights, minimum wage adjustments, and securing the future of Caprica's workforce.
auto-events-29: A day dedicated to young voters, featuring policy workshops, networking, and a keynote address on the future of our republic.
auto-events-37: Safiyya Bethune outlines her vision for the state, focusing on regional infrastructure and public education reform.
auto-events-45: A press conference and public meet-and-greet detailing plans to revitalize the state's aging transportation networks.
auto-events-53: Join Safiyya on the trail as she visits local vendors, talks with farmers, and outlines her agricultural platform.
auto-events-61: A family-friendly event with food and games, giving Ambrosia residents a chance to meet their candidate, Marcus Horvat.
auto-events-69: Marcus Horvat meets with local business owners to discuss economic revitalization in the Ambrosia region.
auto-events-77: William Smith tours the local tech hub and announces his plan for expanding digital infrastructure in Kazana.
auto-events-85: A press event focusing on securing and upgrading Kazana's critical maritime trading routes.
auto-events-93: Sherwin Hildebrand meets with shift workers to discuss manufacturing jobs and workplace safety regulations.
auto-events-101: A town hall focused on securing better funding for technical and vocational schools in Mezata.
auto-events-109: Join Adam Scholz for a community volunteer day focused on protecting Oplana's coastal environments.
auto-events-114: Adam Scholz: Oplana Tourism Board Meet
auto-events-117: Adam Scholz discusses strategies for sustainably growing the local tourism economy in Oplana.
auto-events-122: Noodles dos Açores: Reno Agricultural Fair
auto-events-125: Noodles dos Açores kicks off the campaign in Reno by judging the annual agricultural exhibits and speaking with local farmers.
auto-events-130: Noodles dos Açores: Reno Water Rights Debate
auto-events-133: A highly anticipated debate regarding the future of irrigation and water allocation in the Reno region.
cand-page-desc: Men and women from across the Republic, standing for their communities.
auto-candidates-8: Mandy Trottier
auto-candidates-11: Don't switch horses mid-stream! An endorsed Presidential Candidate representing the Alternative Labour Party, Mandy is deeply devoted to the people of Caprica and the Republican cause.
auto-candidates-12: Isolde von Dittarsdorf
auto-candidates-15: The incumbent Vice President and official running-mate representing Caprica Unity, Isolde has been an unwavering partner to President Trottier and a relentless advocate for the working masses.
cand-meet-desc: Join our candidates at town halls, rallies, and community meetings near you.
